# Sketchblock

Sketchblock is a self-hosted visual collaboration workspace for Excalidraw boards stored in GitHub repositories.

## Documentation

- Quickstart: https://mimeonline.github.io/sketchblock/docs/getting-started/quickstart
- Configuration: https://mimeonline.github.io/sketchblock/docs/operations/configuration
- Architecture: https://mimeonline.github.io/sketchblock/docs/project/architecture
- Roadmap: https://github.com/mimeonline/sketchblock/blob/main/ROADMAP.md
- Security: https://mimeonline.github.io/sketchblock/docs/project/security
- Contributing: https://mimeonline.github.io/sketchblock/docs/project/contributing

Source: https://github.com/mimeonline/sketchblock
